questions.questionText: The capacitance of a parallel plate capacitor is C. If the area of the plates is doubled and the separation between them is halved, the new capacitance will be:

A capacitor of 4 μF is charged to 50 V and another capacitor of 2 μF is charged to 100 V. They are then connected in parallel with like plates together. The common potential is:
